MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing Clinic, Inc. is present. Represented by Jesus Lopez.
Attorney Margaret DeMatteo appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant Troy Williams is present.
Attorney David Marty representing the defendant through limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Deb Schweizer, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of MAR-11-2013 is vacated.
